message:
fix: Zig 0.15 ArrayList/HashMap API migration

In Zig 0.15, std.ArrayList and HashMap no longer have .init(allocator).
Instead, they use empty struct initialization: .{}

Updated all codegen modules to emit the new API:
- `var x = std.ArrayList(T).init(allocator)` -> `var x: std.ArrayList(T) = .{}`
- `.field = HashMap(T).init(allocator),` -> `.field = .{},`

This fixes compilation errors in generated code that uses sys.argv,
collections, argparse, csv, email, http, and other stdlib modules.
